skills.description: Attempt to refute the implementation and classify findings before closure.
instructions: Review from an independent or clean context.
Classify findings as Blocker, Major, Minor, or Question.
Correct all Blockers and Majors before closure.
Use the adversarial checklist in AGENTS.md when the harness cannot invoke this skill.

skills.description: Collect automatic and manual evidence using the active profile.
instructions: Run only validations from active profiles.
Attach evidence references to the issue or pull request.
Never convert missing, skipped, or cancelled evidence to PASS.

skills.description: Enrich an issue without replacing its original text.
instructions: Append context, observable criteria, dependencies, surfaces, risks, evidence, rollback, and non-goals.
Record owner, state, and manual gates.
Search for duplicates before proposing a change.
